description: FQTS quality specifications for WHK curated data products

data_products.name: Production Context Dataset
data_products.description: Batch/lot records with process parameters, material genealogy, equipment state, quality results — all normalized and time-aligned

quality_rules.description: 95% of records must have equipment, batch, and lot context
Most recent record must be within 1 hour
99% of temperature values must be within -40°C to 200°C
When batch_id is set, lot_id should also be set 95% of the time

slos.measurement: percentage of records with all required context fields
percentage of time most recent record is within 1 hour
percentage of values within expected ranges

data_products.name: Inventory-Production Linkage
data_products.description: WMS inventory movements linked to MES production orders with material genealogy

quality_rules.description: 90% of linkage records must have lot and equipment context
When lot_id is set, equipment_id should also be set

slos.measurement: percentage of linkage records with required fields
percentage of time most recent record is within 4 hours

data_products.name: Equipment Utilization Dataset
data_products.description: Equipment state timeline with batch context, shift context, maintenance windows

quality_rules.description: 98% of records must have equipment ID and operating mode
Most recent record must be within 30 minutes
When equipment_id is set, area should also be set

slos.measurement: percentage of records with equipment and operating mode
percentage of time most recent record is within 30 minutes
